title: First, Do No Harm (With LLMs): Mitigating Racial Bias via Agentic Workflows
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used in clinical settings, raising concerns about racial bias in both generated medical text and clinical reasoning. Existing studies have identified bias in medical LLMs, but many focus on s...
